trajectory.thought: Need to access order #000000594 details to review comments history and staff notes for refund request.

trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: Order status is 'Complete' with item status 'Shipped' (Qty Shipped: 1). No comments in 'Notes for this Order' section regarding delivery issues. The only staff note (Jan 13, 2026) references a prior bundle refund request for a defective item, not delivery failure.

WHY IT MATTERS: System records confirm shipment was processed (1 unit shipped), and no delivery issues were logged in staff notes. Customer's claim of non-delivery contradicts the 'Shipped' status with no supporting evidence in the comments history.
